In a sauce pot, flambe the sake and cook the alcohol out
Add in the other ingredients and cook until thoroughly warmed and mixed
Transfer to the vitamix blender and blend on high until smooth
Reserve in quart containers and cool in the blast chiller or an ice bath.
Store in the cooler
